sentences.text: Thank you for calling D T H Management Group. Our office hours are monday through friday from eight a.m. To five p.m. If you know your party's extension, you may dial it at any time. You May Press nine to access our company directory Or Press zero to reach the operator. Again. Thank you for calling D T H Management Group. D T H Management.
Good, good. My, my name is fred I'm calling from rentable. I was just wondering who I would need to speak to in regards to um the marketing advertising and listing of your vacant units.

Oh, you've reached the voicemail for pam. Higgins. I'm either on the other line or I have stepped away from my desk. Please leave me a message and I'll return your call as soon as possible. Thank you. And have a great day. Please leave your message after the tone when done? Hang up or press the pound key.

Hi pam, this is fred calling from rentable. I have been trying to get in contact with the person at a responsible for the marketing advertising and listing of your vacancies and uh the operator uh transfer me here. So I guess that's you. I was just hoping to schedule a call to tell you what uh rentable can do and how we're helping a bunch of other uh marketing directors. Um My number is six billion three hundred fifteen million two hundred eleven thousand five hundred and forty-two If you
can give me a call back, I'll try to find your emails and an email follow up as well, but hopefully we can connect soon. Thanks.

conversation.title: Call: Fred Amenita and Dallas Graves @ DTH Management Group, Ltd.
